queries: Best treatment for melasma near Houston
action.query: Best treatment for melasma near Houston

content.text:
Melasma is a common skin condition characterized by dark, discolored patches, often on the face. Effective treatments are available in the Houston area, ranging from topical medications to advanced laser therapies. Here are some reputable clinics offering melasma treatments:

**[DermSurgery Associates – Main - Dermatology](https://www.dermsurgery.org/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Dermatologist · 4.6 (87 reviews)**  
_6700 W Loop S Suite 500, Bellaire, TX 77401_  
Offers treatments including topical medications like hydroquinone and tretinoin, as well as in-office procedures such as Fraxel® laser skin resurfacing and chemical peels.

**[Houston Laser Skin Center](https://www.houstonlasers.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Medical clinic**  
_Houston, TX 77065_  
Provides laser therapy using advanced technology to target hyperpigmentation associated with melasma, with treatments designed to be quick and comfortable.

**[Elite Dermatology & Plastic Surgery](https://www.elitedermatology.com/?utm_campaign=heights&utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Dermatologist · 4.8 (946 reviews)**  
_2222 N Shepherd Dr Suite 102, Houston, TX 77008_  
Provides integrative treatments for melasma, including topical therapies and advanced procedures, across multiple locations in the Greater Houston area.

**[West Houston Dermatology](http://www.whderm.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Dermatologist · 3.8 (85 reviews)**  
_2925 Briarpark Dr # 150, Houston, TX 77042_  
Offers a variety of treatments including topical medications, chemical peels, microdermabrasion, and fractional laser therapy to address melasma.

**[Dermatology & Laser Surgery Center](https://www.dermlasersurgery.com/?utm_medium=organic&utm_campaign=dermatology+laser+surgery+center+houston+tx&utm_source=openai)**  
**Closed · Skin care clinic · 4.7 (300 reviews)**  
_1802 Binz St Suite 500, Houston, TX 77004_  
Offers treatments such as microdermabrasion, Clear + Brilliant® Touch Laser, Vbeam® Laser, Spectra™ Laser Skin Treatment, and PicoWay™ for melasma.

**[Inkfree, MD Laser Clinic](https://www.inkfreemd.com/?utm_source=openai)**  
**Open now · Tattoo removal service · 4.8 (119 reviews)**  
_11240 Farm to Market 1960 Rd W #401, Houston, TX 77065_  
Utilizes the SPECTRA™ laser, the only FDA-cleared laser for melasma treatment, providing effective outcomes as part of a comprehensive treatment regimen.

It's essential to consult with a board-certified dermatologist to determine the most appropriate treatment plan tailored to your specific needs. These clinics offer a range of options to help manage and reduce the appearance of melasma effectively.
